49.reason: [Using uninitialized variable 'len'; 'len' is declared but never assigned a value, leading to undefined behavior in the loop condition.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Using uninitialized variable 'len'; 'len' is declared but never assigned a value, leading to undefined behavior in the loop condition.]

54.reason: [Potential out-of-bounds access: when i=0, s[i-1] accesses s[-1]; when i is the last index, s[i+1] may be out of bounds. Also, no check ensures that '-' is not at the start or end of the string.]
